title: plain SELECT reads different results in the same transaction
poc: create table t0 (pk int primary key, col0 int, col1 int);
update t0 set col0 = 1 where pk > 0;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent results from multiple SELECTs in a transaction
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10,2));
SELECT id, name FROM t1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
